data.name: CF-WAF-SQLi — SQL Injection against shop.soledrop.co (WAF ML score)
data.description: Detects SQL-injection attempts on the SoleDrop webstore using Cloudflare's WAF machine-learning SQLi attack score (unmapped.WAFSQLiAttackScore, class_uid 4002, 'HTTP Requests'). The score runs 1-99 where LOWER is more malicious and is NULL on benign traffic; we cast with number() and fire only when the score is present AND in the high-confidence malicious band 1-20. Groups by src_ip + host + country and emits one alert per attacking source, carrying the request count, the single lowest (most-malicious) score, and the worst offending URI (max_by on inverted score). Low false-positive because it keys on Cloudflare's trained ML verdict rather than a static signature, and it ignores the benign 21-99 band and unscored requests entirely. Threshold is any qualifying request (rule threshold >0) since a single confirmed SQLi probe on a public store is actionable. MITRE ATT&CK T1190 (Exploit Public-Facing Application). Covers OneFlare scenario 01.

scheduledParams.query:
class_uid=4002 dataSource.cloudflare_dataset='HTTP Requests' unmapped.WAFSQLiAttackScore=*
| let src_ip     = src_endpoint.ip
| let host       = http_request.url.hostname
| let country    = src_endpoint.location.country
| let sqli_score = number(unmapped.WAFSQLiAttackScore)
| let malice     = 100 - sqli_score
| filter sqli_score >= 1 AND sqli_score <= 20
| group
    attack_requests = count(),
    lowest_score    = min(sqli_score),
    sample_uri      = max_by(http_request.url.url_string, malice),
    sample_ua       = any(http_request.user_agent),
    first_seen      = oldest(timestamp),
    last_seen       = newest(timestamp)
  by src_ip, host, country
| let detection_time = simpledateformat(last_seen, 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss z', 'America/Chicago')
| sort -attack_requests
| columns detection_time, src_ip, host, country, attack_requests, lowest_score, sample_uri, sample_ua, first_seen
| limit 100
